question.label: Gap awareness
question.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?
question.description: Tests whether they can name their own gaps before the manager does.

answer: The gap is less technical and more around visible ownership.

assessment.note: He names a specific non-technical gap in visible ownership, showing strong growth-gap awareness and some clarity about the issue; [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] 'visible ownership' could be unpacked next session.

new_queue.label: Questioning cadence
new_queue.name: What tends to stop you from asking a question early?

new_queue.label: Next signal
new_queue.name: What would you want me to see differently by our next check-in?

history.answer_excerpt: I probably should ask for sharper feedback earlier than I do.
I have not built enough trust with adjacent teams yet.
I think I am shipping, but I am not sure I am aiming at the highest-leverage work yet.
I have made a few calls independently, but I still over-index on being safe.
